title: Total Functions, Result Values, and Pattern Matching · Transformation Lens: Error Accumulation
summary: Make a batch import explain every rejected record rather than aborting or returning ambiguous sentinels. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp error accumulation increment in a typed parse-validate-result pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose fail-fast or error accumulation from stakeholder correction needs.
Use structural pattern matching with guarded, ordered, and intentionally exhaustive cases.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
